classObjective: Write linear equations in slope-intercept form given the slope and y-intercept and rewrite linear equations from standard form into slope-intercept form.
workedExamples: 4-3, Example 1 — Write Equations from Slope and y-Intercept
warmUp: Write the equation of a line with slope 3 and y-intercept -2
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: direct substitution into y = mx + b; isolating y from standard form; coefficient handling
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice writing equations from slope/intercept and converting between forms
independentPractice: Practice problems writing linear equations and converting standard form to slope-intercept form
assessment: Exit ticket: write 2x + 5y = 15 in slope-intercept form and identify m and b
capReflection: Why is slope-intercept form particularly useful for quickly graphing a linear equation?
